programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With new places on the calendar, over 16 stages, broadcasting in over 100 countries and in its 13th year, the MLO Strongman Champions League (SCL) can be seen truly as the biggest strongman league in the world. This competition in Portugal is full of memorable performances and strong results and this is the final! (S6 E16)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The spectacular Fefor Arena hosted for the 8th time the Worlds Strongest Viking, part of the SCL World Series. But with the absence of former title holders its anyones game. Again, a very spectacular episode of the Strongman Champions League here in Norway. (S7 E01)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, the Titan, former double World champion from Latvia will compete against his fellow countryman and the current World champion - Aivars Smaukstelis. With 8 events over 2 stages the contestants are pushed to their limits in Finland. (S7 E02)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Dainis Zageris and Aivars Smaukstelis, both from Latvia have a serious, strong battle in the this second and final episode of the SCL Finland 2020. Watch the unbelievable and brute power of these athletes in the last 4 events to crown the winner. (S7 E03)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020. (S7 E04)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events? (S7 E05)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events. (S7 E06)

programme.title: Wives With Knives

programme.title: Wives With Knives
programme.desc: Terri Pearson is a transgender woman who's left to survive on the streets. She saves every penny to pay for her transition surgery and meets a man online. The romance blossoms then sours once he starts abusing her and she's forced to fight for her life.

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In this thrilling new series, Piers Morgan ventures behind bars once again. programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: At Missouri's Crossroads Correctional Facility, Piers Morgan comes face to face with Lorenzo Gilyard—the Kansas City Strangler, and sets out to discover what drove this soft-spoken, seemingly ordinary man to kill multiple times over seventeen years.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies march up and down a hill and then they watch some children explore the colour pink. Tinky Winky doesn't know how to make Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.desc: The Tubbies love to run round and round Teletubbyland, but stop to watch three children make some modelling dough to play with. The Tubby Toaster makes a big piece of Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little girl have her hair braided by her mum. They put different coloured bands in her hair. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky can't sleep. So Dipsy sings a song, his song helps all the Tubbies go to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls decorate a pot. Teletubbies love to play, but one by one, their favourite things go missing. Where can they be?

programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Thomas and Jack having fun playing on the beach and building sandcastles. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go up the slide to see two children help mend a dry stone wall. A wall appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Po and Tinky Winky play a game with the wall.

programme.title: Piper's Pony Tales: Songs

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies battle an evil squad of cheerleaders and their bitter coach.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Sam falls for a seemingly nice boy at school, only to find out that he is using her to steal a top secret invisibility serum from the military!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: A villain invents a device which literally captures extreme sports stars and places them into an extreme video game!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies are replaced by a trio of former spies who have come out of 'retirement' but Clover, Sam and Alex soon find out that the former spies' intentions aren't so benevolent...

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies go after an art thief only to find that all of their leads point to a supposedly deceased magician!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: A sinister store in malls across the world is abducting shoppers and turning them into anti-consumer terrorists.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies battle a villain who is stealing souls from the youth of America in order to retain his own youth.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: A villain replaces leaders of the world with animatrons in an effort to turn the world into a giant, dangerous amusement park.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: A villain plans to freeze the world, returning it to the Ice Age and wiping out the harm that humans have done to the environment.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies battle a villain who has abducted the top movie stars of the world to use them in his insanely realistic and dangerous action film.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies go undercover as the opening band on overnight pop-sensation Ricky Mathis' world tour in order to investigate what's making his fans act so crazy...

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The girls travel to the African Nation of Lyrobia to investigate a strange kidnapping attempt against that country's Queen Tassara - a kidnapping attempt with an anti-gravity ray!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The girls arrive at WOOHP to find that Jerry has retired. In his place is Mac Smit - a handsome, charismatic, intelligent, cool, thirty-something who Sam develops a bit of a crush on.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Experiencing burn out and fatigue from their incessant spy missions, the girls are pleasantly surprised when Jerry sends them on vacation to Hawaii!

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend. The loss of Zane has fractured the team of Ninja, but when a mysterious invitation to Master Chen's ‘Tournament of Elements' arrives, everything is thrown into question – Is Zane alive, and are there others out there with powers like them? Sensei Garmadon warns them not to trust Master Chen, but they go in order to find Zane and make the team whole. On route to the island, the Ninja are briefly introduced to the other unique fighters with elemental powers, and the mysterious and beautiful Skylor intrigues Kai. Kai gets into a humbling scrap with Karlof, the Master of Metal, and learns some fights must be done on your own.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Cheat Code
programme.desc: Competing over who can ask Zoey to join their Sheep Week team, Logan cheats and unwittingly endangers the video game based Cyber Realm.

programme.title: The Bigger Picture
programme.desc: When the kids meddle in their teacher's dream to find test answers, they realize that in dreams, sweet little Ms. Putnam isn't so sweet... or little!

programme.title: Beasts And Dragons, Rise Of Garmadon
programme.desc: Zane, Jay, and Kai remember some of Ninjago's fearsome creatures so that Cole defend the cave from an unidentified monster. But Ninja confront memories of their greatest villain and ally, Garmadon, before the threat to Zane controls him completely.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry brute and worse - the boys locker room!Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The disabling of Soundwave's deployer creates a unique opportunity for Ratchet and Wheeljack.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The final relic in the hunt may prove more deadly to Bulkhead than the Insecticon warriors who pursue him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Miko and Wheeljack embark on a quest for revenge.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Arcee is reunited with an old friend, and together they uncover a Decepticon plotengineered by Shockwave.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While fighting the Autobots, Galvatron loses his temper and unleashes his fury against his own troops.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream is back, and this time he's in Scourge's body!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons fool Galvatron into releasing the vampiric Dweller from the dark core of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons invent a machine which turns a human's worst nightmares into real-life creatures.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: First Aid blames himself for the theft of Metroplex's transformation cog and quits the Protectobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to bring about a much-needed peace between two alien races.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons will do anything to recover an ancient journal that's hidden on Junkion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A crime lord enlists the help of Cobra Commander to entrap the minds of the Autobots in human bodies.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Adventures Of Robin Smurf: The Smurfs' theatrical production of 'Robin Smurf' comes to life as the legendary hero is portrayed by a really good actor...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Dancing Shoes: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Brainy's Smarty Party: Brainy invites all the Smurfs to his party but kicks them out one by one when they don't have fun the way he instructs them. All the outcasts throw their own party and are gracious enough to allow Brainy to join them.

programme.title: Handy's Window-Vision
programme.desc: Miner Smurf leaves no stone unturned and this is how he discovers a crystal that transmits images. Thus Handy is able to invent window-vision and, every morning from then on, the Smurfs are able to watch Hefty's workouts, Farmer Smurf's crop reports or even the Brainy Smurf Hour. But would you believe it? The evil wizard Gargamel takes advantage of this image-watching to catch Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - One Good Smurf Deserves Another: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt… With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Mere Truffle: The Smurfs love truffles but truffles belong to the Trolls and the Trolls live under Truffle Troll Mountain, where in the shadows of the lake lurks the Thing with No Name...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Winged Wizard: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bigmouth Smurf: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Journey To The Centre Of The Smurf: Winter is setting in on the Village of the Smurfs. The little Smurfs are freezing. But what is Clumsy doing with this strange rock he's discovered? And why is Miner Smurf so enthusiastic about their new discovery? Surely, one more addition to Clumsy's rock collection is not worth all this hoopla... The Smurfs will discover danger and surprises when they go underground.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sister Smurf: Smurfette has found a new friend, Laura, a six-year-old child whose parents live near the forest. Together, the two girls wander in the forest. But an old witch who lives in the forest catches them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bookworm Smurf: Brainy Smurf is aghast. Sassette cannot read, and thus might be forever prevented from learning the pearls of wisdom collected in his book "Brainy Smurf's quotations"! He tries teaching her how to read. What she can read almost from the start is a formula to make all the books disappear! All the books in the world, including Gargamel's spells and Homnibus' books of remedies!

programme.title: The Last Whippoorwill
programme.desc: There are poachers in the Duke of Bedford's forest. They almost succeed in catching the Whippoorwill that lives there... But worse than that, the Duke's son, Chauncey, finds the bird's egg and takes it to the castle for his collection. The Whippoorwill is not doing its insect-eating job anymore, and gnats, mosquitoes, bugs of every type abound. Can the Smurfs restore the Whippoorwill's egg to be nest?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All Hallowseve: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: The Rabbids are on a mission.
programme.desc: Two rabbids play a bowling game using penguins as bowling pins.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: Welcome to the Rabbids!
programme.desc: A solitary rabbid who has no friend to fly with him to the Moon goes out on a search for one.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: The Rabbids are moving.
programme.desc: A Rabbid has fun playing a game where he suddenly jumps out of a box to surprise his friends.

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E10)

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E11)

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik goes back to medieval times, and enlists the help of Merlink the Magician to get his gemstone.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. programme.title: Beyblade

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade

programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers.

programme.desc: Sparks fly between a woman and her ex-boyfriend as they work together, to sell her aunt's pecan farm.

programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A government experiment inadvertently creates a time warp and suddenly a dangerous World War Two battleship appears. Stars Malcolm McDowell (2012).

programme.title: STORM CELL
programme.desc: A super storm is on its way to destroying Seattle.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: The moon becomes unstable after it is hit by a gigantic asteroid...and this collision has the potential to devastate planet Earth. Stars Stephen Baldwin (2006).

programme.title: Solar Attack
programme.desc: When a solar storm beings to ignite the Earth's atmosphere, the president has to call in a specialist scientist to try and stop the devastation. Starring Mark Dacascos and Joanne Kelly (2006).

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: A comet passes near the Earth and disturbs Earth's magnetic field.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston).

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: Red Dog
programme.desc: The story of a legendary, lovable red dog who roamed the outback looking for his original master

programme.title: The Assignment
programme.desc: After acceptance to a prestigious music school, Eliza's world is rocked when she discovers a shocking mystery about her family.

programme.title: The Assignment
programme.desc: After acceptance to a prestigious music school, Eliza's world is rocked when she discovers a shocking mystery about her family.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Mexico, two very different women become a bank robbery duo to fight a ruthless enforcer terrorizing their city.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: A failed New York playwright awkwardly navigates the transition from Next Big Thing to Last Year's News. Starring: Kristen Wiig, Annette Bening, Matt Dillon, Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: High commanding officers conspire a plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner stars in a pulse-pounding action heist film set in the world of parkour.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A CIA operative's identity is leaked by the government as payback for an op-ed article her husband wrote.

programme.title: Jackie Brown
programme.desc: A bail bondsman helps a smuggler frame her boss, an arms dealer who plans to kill her.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: The Quake delivers non-stop action and edge-of-your-seat thrills at an epic scale! A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake of 5.3 magnitude strikes Oslo, Norway. Your nails will dig into the arms of your chair in this incredible disaster movie with jaw-dropping special effects.

programme.title: Red Dog: The Early Years
programme.desc: The heart-warming sequel to the box-office triumph Red Dog. A paw-some adventure starring Pan's Levi Miller and Harry Potter favourite Jason Isaacs. A young boy discovers a puppy covered in blue paint, while living on a ranch with his grandma. Together they em-BARK on an exciting adventure and become the best of friends. A touching, uplifting coming-of-age tale for all the family.

programme.title: The Standoff at Sparrow Creek
programme.desc: A claustrophobic, tense revenge thriller in the vein of Reservoir Dogs. After a mass shooting at a police funeral, ex-cop Gannon realises that the killer belongs to the same militia he joined after quitting the force. Knowing that the shooting could set off more violence, Gannon quarantines his fellow militiamen in order to find the culprit. A twisty whodunnit from the producers of Bone Tomahawk.

programme.title: Final Recall
programme.desc: A group of friends are spending the weekend at a cabin while aliens have begun to attack planet Earth. Annie and Charlie survive the mass-abduction and must rely on an eccentric hunter who seems to have special knowledge of the attack.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: The Charm of Love
programme.desc: Art historian Madison “Maddie” TURNER, an expert in ancient artifacts and in deflecting unwanted male attention, travels halfway around the world to the Caribbeans in order to find the legendary "Lovers Stone".

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: When successful podcaster Samantha Desouza is re-assigned to host Heartwaves, a feel-good love song show with a segment that reunites lost loves, she is less than impressed – love isn't her favourite topic right now.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A story of a rich Edwardian widow who marries a handsome Tuscan dentist but dies in childbirth. Her English family travel to Italy in order to bring the child back home to England, but are unprepared for what unfolds...

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: Coffee Shop
programme.desc: A small-town coffee shop owner's romance with a struggling playwright from New York is threatened when her shop goes into foreclosure and her ex-boyfriend returns to town to save it.

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: All Summers End
programme.desc: After a summer prank goes awry, a teenage boy falls in love while grappling with his guilty conscience.

programme.title: The Confession
programme.desc: All her life, Katie Lapp (Katie LeClerc) has known no other world than that of the Amish family who raised her. But upon discovering that she was actually adopted from out of the "English" world, her quest for answers to her identity resulted in her being shunned by her people. Now in "The Confession," the thrilling sequel to "The Shunning," Katie is on an even greater quest--to be reunited before it is too late with her long-lost birth mother, Laura Mayfield (Sherry Stringfield), who is dying of cancer. Only the challenges of being Amish in an English world stand in her way... along with one man who has other plans for her biological mother's legacy.

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise
programme.desc: Ellie tends to the injured and cantankerous Jordan as he heals from a shoulder injury. Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes ‘cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing he can ‘borrow,' and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where people come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local female chef.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Waking Up to Danger
programme.desc: Young mother with memory loss suspects husband's actions put family in danger.

programme.title: Surviving Abduction
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment.

programme.title: A Sister's Secret
programme.desc: Twin suicide spurs sister's revenge.

programme.title: A Sister's Secret
programme.desc: Twins switch places and one is murdered. Survivor hides identity from family.

programme.title: Waking Up to Danger
programme.desc: Young mother with memory loss suspects husband's actions put family in danger.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: Bad Girl
programme.desc: Summertime distances a father (Darrin Dewitt Henson) and his teenage daughter (Ajiona Alexus) until they discover the value of family and love.

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.title: I Think I Do
programme.desc: The relationship between three sisters, as one is left at the altar on her wedding day.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: In Neil Simon's SEEMS LIKE OLD TIMES, Chevy Chase is forced to abet some bank robbers, and soon the cops are after him. His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A woman verging on thirty and frustrated in a temp secretary job takes on a yearlong culinary quest: cook all 524 recipes in Julia Child's "Mastering the Art of French Cooking." She chronicles her trials and tribulations in a blog that catches on with the food crowd.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: In this love triangle comedy, a white collar executive and professional baseball player are each vying for the affections of the same woman.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college (Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon, Jillian Bell, Ilana Glazer and Zoë Kravitz) reunite 10 years later for a wild weekend getaway in Miami. Their outrageous antics and hard partying result in hilarious unexpected consequences which land them in a seemingly impossible situation to escape.

programme.title: Day of Anger
programme.desc: Bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials, not the usual James gang.

programme.title: A Minute to Pray, a Second to Die
programme.desc: In Tuscola, New Mexico, the Governor offers amnesty papers to all outlaws but gunfighter Clay McCord's appearance triggers a violent confrontation between the local marshal, McCord, and other outlaws

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You Trinity!
programme.desc: Trinity is an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. Unfortunately for him, a ruthless bounty hunter is on his trail.

programme.title: Silent Thunder
programme.desc: With the help of two bank robbers, a US Marshal sets out to rescue five prostitutes who have been abducted by a gang of desert dwelling, otherworldly, monsters

programme.title: The Bargee
programme.desc: Hemel's adventures and his entanglements with irascible lock-keeper Hugh Griffith and skirmishes with boating playboy Eric Sykes make this the narrow boats comedy of the year.

programme.title: ASK A POLICEMAN
programme.desc: When the Chief Constable suggests that a sleepy village does not need a police force, the resident officers try to create an artificial crime wave. Then they discover a gang of smugglers. An irreverent send up of the British bobby starring Will Hay.

programme.title: BAND WAGGON
programme.desc: After being evicted from BBC Broadcasting House, Arthur (Arthur Askey) and his friend Stinker move to a castle where they come upon television equipment which they use to put on a show - not realising that it is in use by German agents.

programme.title: THE FAST LADY
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Stanley Baxter and Julie Christie.

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: A dashing young officer arrives on Captain Armitage's flagship. But the two men are not strangers, for the new recruit is the man who broke up Captain Armitage's marriage by running away with his wife.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds.

programme.title: Dominion: The Last Star Warrior
programme.desc: In five days the world changed. As a retired Intelligence agent turned UFO investigator races to discover the fate of the human race, an alien observer searchs for the human woman he loves.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Miss Bala
programme.desc: A beauty contest winner is forced to work for a crime boss after she witnesses a murder. A remake of the 2011 film, 'Miss Bala.'

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A tough female ex-con and her recalcitrant 6-year-old charge go on the run from the mob.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of an international finance deal in New York and Peru, 'The Deal' is an intense political drama which explores how far people will go to get what they want.

programme.title: The Book of Love
programme.desc: When Penny, the light of Henry's life, is killed in a car crash, he puts everything on hold as he tries to come to terms with his loss. When his bereavement leave is over, everyone expects straight-laced Henry to return to work. But now everything has changed and Henry is not going back.

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: "The Match" tells the story of the true events which transpired in the spring of 1944 when Nazis organized a football match between the Hungarian prisoners and an elite Nazi team to commemorate Adolf Hitler's birthday.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: The British Mi5, his impossibly wife and an international terrorist, debonair art Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to bank account.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme and Raul Julia star in this explosive action-adventure based on one of the most successful interactive games of all time. Street Fighter begins in a world on the brink of chaos, as a civil war in the southeast Asian nation of Shadaloo threatens to erupt into global conflict.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.
